paired_100case.conclusion: PAL is competitive and directionally better, but not statistically decisive on this 100-case sample.

retry_patch.conclusion: Keep retry-on-empty-code: beneficial but still brittle.

claim_boundaries: No claim that PAL+retry beats external_l1_max globally yet.
The 100-case paired result is promising but statistically non-decisive.
Retry evidence is targeted to retry-eligible external-only/code-absence losses, not an unbiased global estimate.
recommended_next_step: Stop new API for now and prepare a clean PR/report for the retry patch (including no-API tests and 16-case live retry evidence). After merge/review, run a new paired PAL+retry vs external_l1_max validation.
